prompt: High-fidelity vertical portrait 9:16 mobile GAME UI mockup, production quality. A DEEP-SEA PEARL VOYAGE board-game activity screen, redrawn keeping the REFERENCE image's exact composition. KEEP the layout: a winding loop/circuit of small game tiles arranged AROUND a large ornate golden COMPASS medallion in the CENTER, laid over an ocean map. RE-THEME to deep sea: teal and aqua water, deep blue depths, coral, rising bubbles, soft god-rays. Tiles are small rounded reef/island nodes connected by a dotted sailing route forming a loop around the central compass. A cute mermaid siren heroine character standing on the start tile. A few glowing pearl-in-shell icons sit on some tiles. Top bar: gem and coin currency pills on the right, a round close button top-right, and a slim progress bar pointing toward a treasure chest. Bottom: a dice and one large prominent golden -roll to sail- button. Ornate golden frame around the whole panel. Stylized 3D cartoon rendering, warm rim light on icons, integrated depth and lighting, NOT flat tiles on a plain grid. Rich, atmospheric, sharp rendering, high resolution.
